title: Low disk space cleanup

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Laptop has low disk space warning
servicenow_seed.description: User receives low disk warnings and cannot install a required update. Device has 4 GB free on C:.

correct_steps: Run Disk Cleanup or Storage Sense
Clear temp files and recycle bin
Move user files to OneDrive if appropriate
Retry update and confirm free space
rationale: Low disk space on one endpoint is Desktop Support/Tier 1 or Tier 2 endpoint work, not database or network.
